summary: Complete testing of NextActionsPanel redesign and LetterFormModal features. All features working correctly: TYPE A (letter - blue envelope), TYPE B (call - purple phone), TYPE C (passive - gray clock) action classification, LetterFormModal with 6 form fields + personal note, pre-filled user name from profile, letter generation via /api/cases/{case_id}/generate-action-letter, letter preview with Download PDF + Send via HelloSign + Edit with James options.

1_login_and_dashboard.evidence: Login with test@jasper.legal / JasperPro2026! successful, dashboard loads with data-testid='dashboard-page'

2_right_panel_redesign.evidence: Right panel (data-testid='right-panel') shows 'NEXT ACTIONS' section with redesigned action cards

3_action_card_structure.evidence: Each action card has: priority number badge (1, 2, 3), icon top right, title, description, separator between cards

4_type_a_letter_actions.evidence: Letter actions have blue title (#1a56db), Mail icon, 'Generate letter →' link

5_type_b_call_actions.evidence: Call actions have purple title (#7c3aed), Phone icon, 'Book a call →' link

6_type_c_passive_actions.evidence: Code verified: passive actions have gray color (#6b7280), Clock icon, no hover effect, cursor: default (no current case had passive actions to test visually)

7_letter_form_modal_opens.evidence: Clicking letter action opens LetterFormModal with data-testid='letter-form-modal'

8_prefilled_user_name.evidence: 'Your full name' field pre-filled with 'Alex Thompson' from user profile

9_form_fields.evidence: Modal has all 6 form fields: name, address, recipient name, recipient address, doc date, amount

10_personal_note_textarea.evidence: Personal note textarea present with 0/200 character counter

11_generate_letter_button.evidence: 'Generate letter with James' button (data-testid='generate-letter-btn') present and functional

12_letter_generation_api.evidence: POST /api/cases/{case_id}/generate-action-letter returns 200 with letter body, subject, legal_citations

13_letter_preview.evidence: After generation, shows 'LETTER PREVIEW' section with subject, body, legal citations as blue badges

14_download_pdf_button.evidence: 'Download PDF' button (data-testid='download-letter-pdf') present after letter generation

15_send_via_hellosign.evidence: 'Send via HelloSign' button present after letter generation

16_edit_with_james_link.evidence: 'Edit with James →' link (data-testid='edit-with-james') opens chat drawer with letter context

17_case_detail_integration.evidence: CaseDetail page (data-testid='case-detail-page') renders same NextActionsPanel component with 3 action items

18_case_detail_letter_modal.evidence: Clicking letter action on CaseDetail opens same LetterFormModal with pre-filled name

critical_code_review_comments: NextActionsPanel.js correctly classifies actions using heuristic keyword matching on title and explicit action_type field
LetterFormModal.js properly pre-fills senderName from userName prop passed from Dashboard/CaseDetail
Letter generation uses Claude AI via call_claude() with proper system prompt for legal letter formatting
Character counter for personal note correctly limits to 200 characters
Edit with James link passes letter context to CaseChatDrawer for continued editing
context_for_next_testing_agent: NextActionsPanel and LetterFormModal features fully implemented and tested. Action classification works via heuristic keyword matching (letter keywords: file, motion, challenge, demand, etc.; call keywords: attorney, lawyer, consult, book; passive keywords: wait, monitor, document). LetterFormModal pre-fills user name from profile, has 6 form fields + personal note with 200 char limit, generates letters via Claude AI, shows preview with Download PDF + Send via HelloSign + Edit with James options. Edit with James opens CaseChatDrawer with letter context.
screenshots: .screenshots/dashboard_after_login.png - Dashboard with right panel showing Next Actions
.screenshots/letter_form_modal.png - LetterFormModal with pre-filled name and 6 form fields
.screenshots/letter_generation_result.png - Letter preview with Download PDF, Send via HelloSign, Edit with James
.screenshots/edit_with_james_chat.png - Chat drawer opened with letter context
